title.description: Short name for the proposed hidden-rule hypothesis

rule_summary.description: Concrete explanation of the latent distributional rule this candidate will test and exploit

evidence_to_measure.description: Training-data evidence analyze.py should measure to validate or parameterize the hypothesis

solver_strategy.description: How solution.py should exploit the hypothesis if analysis supports it

expected_failure_modes.description: Ways this hypothesis could be wrong or fail on validation/test instances

diversity_key.description: Stable lowercase key for the broad hypothesis class, used to preserve beam diversity

notes.description: Brief rationale for why this hypothesis is worth testing
